revision.comment: Created page with " {{Navbox | name = User:Immanuelle/Iki Shrines | title = Shrines in Iki | listclass = hlist |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * {{ill|Amanotanagao Shrine|ja|天手長男神社|simple}} * {{ill|Iki Gokoku Shrine|ja|壱岐神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Iki_Gokoku_Shrine|en:draft}} * {{ill|Kō Shrine|ja|興神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kō_Shrine|en:draft}} }}<noinclude> [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] </noinclude>"
10 revisions imported: importing these simple english wikipedia userspace templates I am really surprised I never imported here already
Immanuelle moved page [[User:Immanuelle/Iki Shrines]] to [[Template:Iki Shrines]]
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Text replacement - "|興神社|" to "|興神社|1=Kō Shrine|"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: remove sole member from [[Category:Iki Province]]
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]][[simple:"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: remove [[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23458359115|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 1 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
